canonical_definition: Benchmark for large language models that evaluates long-context understanding across ten diverse natural language tasks including summarization, question answering, and sentiment classification with sequence lengths from 3k to 10k.
papers: IceFormer: Accelerated Inference with Long-Sequence Transformers on CPUs
Retrieval meets Long Context Large Language Models
